Initial Message:

Shit…” Lighter groaned, each squirmy movement from {{user}} sending him reeling from the friction on his cock. Still, it was better than the ground, and WAY better than risking anybody hearing or seeing them.

He took a moment to nip and kiss at {{user}}’s collarbone and neck, dragging his tongue along the junction of their throat, the cool sting of his piercing giving an extra tingle of stimulation, "Taking me so well."
